mapper.select: select keymap_id,key_name, db, seq1, seq2, seq3, key_cols, src_owner, src_table_name, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, status, sqltype, insertstr, wherestr, refstr, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap where order by keymap_id, seq1, seq2, seq3
select distinct keymap_id, key_name, key_cols, refstr from cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap where keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by key_cols
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap (keymap_id, key_name, db, seq1, seq2, seq3, key_cols, src_owner, src_table_name, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, status, sqltype, insertstr, wherestr, refstr, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{src_owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{src_table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insertstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap (keymap_id, key_name, db, seq1, seq2, seq3, key_cols, src_owner, src_table_name, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, status, sqltype, insertstr, wherestr, refstr, regdate, upddate, reguserid, upduserid) values (#{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1}, #{seq2}, #{seq3}, #{key_cols, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{src_owner, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{src_table_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_col, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{where_key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{parallelcnt, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sqltype, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{insertstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{wherestr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{refstr, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, NOW(), NOW(), #{reguserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{upduserid, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select keymap_id, key_name, db, seq1, seq2, seq3, key_cols, src_owner, src_table_name, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, status, sqltype, insertstr, wherestr, refstr, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap where keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and key_name= #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap where keymap_id= #{keymap_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and key_name= #{key_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and db= #{db, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq1= #{seq1} and seq2= #{seq2} and seq3= #{seq3}
mapper.select:
select keymap_id, key_name, db, seq1, seq2, seq3, key_cols, src_owner, src_table_name, where_col, where_key_name, parallelcnt, status, sqltype, insertstr, wherestr, refstr, DATE_FORMAT(regdate,'%Y/%m/%d') as regdate, DATE_FORMAT(upddate,'%Y/%m/%d') as upddate, reguserid, upduserid from cotdl.tbl_piiconfkeymap order by seq1, seq2, seq3
order by keymap_id, seq1, seq2, seq3 limit #{offset}, #{amount}
